laser-machine-750w-017.fullDescription:
Brand: Laser IGNITER
Supply voltage: DC21V (16V-24V)
Center wavelength: 1040
Effective distance: 300 meters
Power: 500 watts
Preview light: with coaxial synchronous focusing green laser (when the green laser is focused, the main laser is focused)
Focusing system: high-precision servo electric focusing, distance knob with meter scale, digital display of focal length, and synchronous focusing with green laser. Focusing does not change the position of the light spot, so it is possible to actively align the target with a magnifying glass without using a green laser. The focal length can be set in advance using a dial and digital focal length display
Power adjustment: The host laser is adjustable, and the green laser is adjustable
Control methods: There are three types that can be operated independently and without interference at the same time,
1. Body button start (both self-locking and electric)
2. Remote start (optional electric or self-locking)
3. External start (short circuit type, can be connected to foot switch)
Alignment method: Coaxial preview green laser+24x mirror+electronic screen. Optional larger aperture high-power mirror.
Attachment installation: 2 21mm standard fishbone guide rails
Cooling method: air cooling, fan can be turned on or off, with electronic temperature protection, forced output stop due to overheating
Power supply: Plug in lithium battery, ensuring uninterrupted operation
Effective distance: cardboard boxes are greater than or equal to 300 meters, and the distance between melted walls or cement bricks is greater than 100 meters
Battery life: 15 ampere power battery, can last for 20 minutes or more at full power (with the option of a larger, higher capacity battery)
PTZ: Precision manual PTZ
Tripod: High quality aluminum alloy tripod
Weight: 6 kilograms (excluding battery)
Volume: Maximum length, width, and height (including protruding handle, lens, and fan) 445 mm X110 mm X170 mm
Body material: aviation aluminum alloy, CNC carved main body of the whole machine

laser-machine-1000w-018.fullDescription:
We only sell to enterprises, power companies or railway companies, communication companies, suitable for clearing high-altitude obstacles!
If you have any questions, please contact us. This is a customized product with a delivery time of 20-30 days.
Laser obstacle clearing device is a device that uses high-energy laser technology to achieve non-contact obstacle clearing,
Mainly used to remove foreign objects suspended at high altitudes in industries such as power systems, railways, and communications
Laser obstacle clearing device,
long-distance laser,
high-power laser,
invisible laser,
laser tree cutting
Equipment model: HT1000D, 1000 watts,
500 meters long distance type
Output power: 0-1000W continuously adjustable
Equipment dimensions: 808+535 * 310mm
Total weight of equipment: ≤ 38KG
Protection level: IP65
Power supply requirement: DC48V2000W
Aiming method: Equipped with a crosshair camera and a blocking type frequency doubling synchronous green laser
PTZ: Electric seamless PTZ
Focusing system:
high-precision servo electric focusing, distance knob with meter scale, digital display of focal length, and synchronous focusing with green laser.
Focusing does not change the position of the light spot, so it is possible to use a magnifying glass to actively align the target without using a green laser.
By setting the focal length in advance using a dial and digital focal length display, it solves the problem of alignment and focusing in the industry
Resolution: 4K
Camera magnification: 30x optical zoom+10x digital zoom
Operating distance: 5-500 meters
Temperature: -20 ℃ -70 ℃ Humidity:>90%
This product requires self configuration of batteries or plug-in use (220V)
Inverter can be used with 110V or 48V
